## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- [Name](URL) - Short description.`
- [ ] Entries are in alphabetical order within the section
- [ ] Description is concise and factual (no marketing language, max ~100 chars)
- [ ] Resource is directly related to Behave (not general BDD or other frameworks)
- [ ] Resource is publicly accessible with a stable URL
- [ ] If adding a new section, it was discussed in an issue first
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines have been read and followed
